instruction: Rewrite the content to meet insurance regulatory and compliance standards.

input.draft_text:
Why get a Long-Term Term Insurance Plan?
Meta description: A long-term term insurance plan can have many benefits for the surviving family members as well as the policyholder. Find out why a long-term term insurance plan is important.
Keywords: long-term insurance, long-term policy, long-term insurance plan, best long-term insurance plans
Introduction
Before you buy a term insurance plan, you need to be sure of different parameters such as the amount of coverage, the additional riders if any, and above all, the duration of the coverage. Many first-time buyers don’t pay much attention to the duration of the policy, because of which they may be insured for a far shorter period than necessary.
Ideally, you should opt for long-term insurance if you want to give your family a reliable financial safety net. A long-term insurance plan can cover you for all of your working years, right up to the time you retire. The best long-term insurance plans also offer coverage beyond your working years, sometimes up to the age of 99 years too!
But what exactly is a long-term insurance plan? And why should you get one? Keep reading to find the answers to these fundamental questions.
What is a Long-Term Insurance Policy?
A long-term insurance policy is a kind of life cover that is available for a considerable period of time, such as 30 years or more. Typically, it should be enough to cover at least the working years of the insured person. So, for instance, if you purchase a long-term insurance policy at the age of 25, and you intend to retire at 60, the long-term insurance plan should have a policy term of at least 35 years, so you are adequately covered till the time you retire.
Term insurance is the most affordable long-term policy that you can purchase in the insurance market. When you purchase a term insurance plan, your nominees will be entitled to the death benefit offered under the plan, in case of your unfortunate demise during the policy term. This payout can help your loved ones maintain their lifestyle and meet their life goals even if they do not have your income to rely on.
Needless to the say, the longer the policy term you opt for, the longer your family will be protected. But aside from this fundamental reason, there are also several other benefits that the best long-term insurance plans offer.
Why get a Long-Term Term Insurance Plan?
Wondering why you should opt for a long-term term insurance plan? Check out the reasons to opt for a long-term insurance plan when you are planning to buy a life cover.
It protects your family against life’s eventualities
You may be young and in great health now, but life can be unpredictable. Having a long-term term insurance plan protects your loved ones against any untoward eventualities that may occur in the future. And in the case of term insurance, in particular, you can obtain a significant life cover of Rs. 1 crore or higher at extremely affordable premiums. So, it is important to have a life cover that is valid over the long term. A short-term cover may be inadequate for your family.
If offers critical illness covers
Long-term term insurance plans also come with the option to enhance the available benefits by purchasing add-on riders. One such rider is the critical illness cover, which offers a lump sum payout in case you are diagnosed with any of the covered critical illnesses. This cover will also be valid over the long term, so you can rest assured that in case something untoward happens, you do not have to deplete your savings to pay for the critical illness treatment.
It can help your spouse remain financially independent
A long-term term plan covers the possibility that your spouse may outlive you. In such a case, if your spouse has been dependent on your income, it may be difficult for them to meet their everyday needs in your absence. A long-term term insurance cover takes care of this eventuality and ensures that your spouse can remain financially independent, thanks to the benefits paid out under the term insurance plan. A short-term cover, on the other hand, may not cover such a situation, particularly if you are only in your 20s or 30s now.
It can help take care of your dependent children
A long-term insurance plan also makes it possible for you to financially secure the future of your dependent children. Over the long term, many major expenses will crop up, such as the costs of higher education for your children and the cost of conducting their wedding. In case you are not around during these milestones, you can rest assured that the long-term cover from your term insurance plan will make it easier for your family to meet these costs without any trouble.
It covers your family’s life goals
Your family will also have many other long-term life goals that need to be fulfilled, such as buying their own home, paying off their debts and more. A long-term term insurance cover can ensure that these life goals are well taken care of, so your family does not have to suffer any financial burden even if you are no longer around.
Conclusion
Now that you know the benefits offered by the best long-term insurance plans, you can ensure that the term insurance cover your purchase is adequate enough to cover you for the right duration. Ensure that your cover lasts as long as you need it, because that will help your family remain sufficiently protected even if something untoward happens to you later in life.
Disclaimer:
The views stated in this article is not to be construed as investment advice and readers are suggested to seek independent financial advice before making any investment decisions. For more details on risk factors, terms and conditions please read sales brochure & policy document (available on www.bajajallianzlife.com) carefully before concluding a sale.
